# Truax Marketing Solutions

> A boutique digital marketing agency specializing in AI implementation, SEO, web development, and strategic marketing for growing businesses.

## About

Truax Marketing Solutions is a results-focused marketing agency founded by Aaron Truax with 20+ years of marketing leadership experience. We take a human-first approach to developing creative strategies, scalable growth systems, and targeted communications.

## Services

### AI Sales Agents
- Automated lead qualification and outreach
- B2B contact database integration
- Multi-channel campaign automation
- Pricing: Starter ($297/mo), Growth ($597/mo), Scale ($997/mo)
- URL: /ai-agents

### Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Technical SEO audits and optimization
- Content strategy and keyword research
- Local SEO for Portland and national businesses
- Pricing: $500-$1,000/month based on scope
- URL: /services/search-engine-optimization

### Web Design & Development
- Custom WordPress development
- Conversion-optimized landing pages
- E-commerce solutions
- URL: /services/web-design-development

### Digital Strategy
- Marketing roadmap development
- Competitive analysis
- Channel strategy and planning
- URL: /services/digital-strategy

### Fractional CMO
- Part-time executive marketing leadership
- Strategic planning and team management
- Marketing operations optimization
- URL: /services/fractional-cmo

### Demand Generation
- Lead generation campaigns
- Marketing automation
- Pipeline development
- URL: /services/demand-generation

### Managed Hosting
- WordPress hosting with 24/7 monitoring
- Security updates and backups
- Performance optimization
- URL: /services/managed-hosting

## Contact

- Website: https://truaxmarketing.com
- Email: hello@truaxmarketing.com
- Phone: (503) 928-7386
- Location: Portland, Oregon
- Book a call: /meet

## Key Differentiators

- Human-first approach in a data-driven world
- 20+ years of marketing leadership experience
- Response time under 24 hours
- No hidden fees or long-term contracts
- 100% senior talent (no junior account managers)
- Average client tenure of 3+ years

## Blog Topics

Our blog covers SEO, digital strategy, content marketing, paid advertising, leadership, and web development. Visit /blog for articles on marketing best practices.
